PublicFooter.description: Innovation and empowerment center for Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs) through smart manufacturing technology and industrial collaboration.

contact.address: Jl. Kanayakan No.21, Dago, Coblong District, Bandung City, West Java 40135

PublicFooter.copyright: Politeknik Manufaktur Bandung. All rights reserved.

HeroSection.description: We deliver smart solutions that adapt to your unique operations, boosting efficiency, traceability, and real-time insights.

ProblemSection.title: Why is modern tech adoption so difficult?
ProblemSection.description: Many SMEs lag behind due to the high costs of R&D and the risks of testing unproven technologies on live production lines. MANGO serves as a Living Lab bridge and Smart Manufacturing solution.

tech_gap.title: Technological Gap
tech_gap.desc: Struggling to transition from conventional machines to smart Industry 4.0 systems due to limited expertise.

isolated.title: Fragmented Systems
isolated.desc: Machine, warehouse, and shop floor data are disconnected, creating informational silos.

no_lab.title: High-Risk Experimentation
no_lab.desc: SMEs lack a safe space (Living Lab) to test new technologies without disrupting their daily production.

inefficiency.title: Limited Scale Inefficiency
inefficiency.desc: Managing a limited manufacturing scope often leads to resource waste and suboptimal output.

SolutionSection.description: An integrated digital platform bridging SMEs with Smart Manufacturing technologies. Built by POLMAN Bandung to drive collaboration and minimize technological risks.

advisor.title: Advisor Mentoring
advisor.desc: Direct collaboration with POLMAN Bandung experts to solve manufacturing technology bottlenecks.

assessment.title: Assessment & Scoring
assessment.desc: Self-analysis of SME technological and operational readiness with accurate scoring metrics.

reservation.title: Facility Reservation
reservation.desc: Access to advanced CNC machines and high-tech manufacturing equipment.

smart_mfg.title: Smart Manufacturing
smart_mfg.desc: IoT-based ERP and MES integration for real-time production monitoring and shop-floor efficiency.

ProductCatalogSection.description: Access a curated catalog of high-quality products and specialized manufacturing services, engineered directly by our certified SME network.

items.prod_1_desc: IoT-integrated automatic control modules to enhance real-time industrial machine efficiency and precision.
items.prod_2_desc: High-accuracy metal component manufacturing using 5-axis CNC machines for heavy industrial needs.
items.prod_3_desc: Design and fabrication of high-quality plastic injection molds with advanced material durability.

ArticleSection.description: Stay ahead of the curve with expert perspectives on industrial IoT, operational efficiency, and tactical scaling strategies for modern SMEs.

CTASection.description: Become a part of the MANGO ecosystem. Get exclusive consultation sessions with expert engineers from POLMAN Bandung, utilize Smart Manufacturing facilities, and let's elevate your industrial competitiveness globally.

FAQSection.description: Find comprehensive information about the MANGO ecosystem's capabilities and the integrated manufacturing solutions we provide to scale your enterprise.

what_is_mango.question: What is the MANGO platform and its primary objective?
what_is_mango.answer: MANGO is an integrated digital ecosystem initiated by POLMAN Bandung, specifically engineered to accelerate the digital transformation of SMEs through Smart Manufacturing, ERP systems, and Living Lab facilities.

who_can_join.question: Who is eligible to participate in the MANGO ecosystem?
who_can_join.answer: The ecosystem welcomes manufacturing SMEs, industry practitioners, academic researchers, and strategic partners dedicated to enhancing shop-floor efficiency and accelerating technology adoption.

is_it_free.question: What is the pricing structure for MANGO services?
is_it_free.answer: Account registration and initial capability assessments are entirely complimentary. Advanced solutions—such as precision machinery (CNC) reservations and custom IoT integrations—are subject to the official UPT service pricing schemes.

how_to_reserve.question: What is the procedure for reserving manufacturing facilities?
how_to_reserve.answer: Registered users can navigate to the 'Facility Reservation' module within the MANGO Dashboard. This feature provides real-time visibility into machine availability and enables seamless, automated booking.

mentoring_support.question: Does MANGO offer technological consultation and mentoring?
mentoring_support.answer: Absolutely. MANGO offers an 'Advisor Mentoring' program where expert consultants from POLMAN Bandung provide end-to-end guidance—from requirements analysis and system design to the implementation of targeted technological solutions.

RegisterPage.title: Create Account
RegisterPage.subtitle: Join the <accent>MANGO Ecosystem</accent> today.
RegisterPage.hero_desc: Experience a new level of industrial growth with our integrated Smart Manufacturing platform.
